safety_overview.title: Safety Features
safety_overview.content:
Pipeflow has your back! Whether you're performing live or just experimenting, our safety features help prevent audio disasters.

The safety system has three pillars:
• Safety Modes - control what changes are allowed
• Panic Button - instant mute for emergencies
• Routing Lock - freeze your connections
safety_overview.tip: Live performers: Check out Stage Mode for maximum protection during shows!

panic_button.title: 🚨 Panic Button
panic_button.content:
The big red button is your emergency stop! Hit it when:

• Feedback screech attacks your ears
• Something starts making unexpected noise
• You need instant silence NOW

Press Space, F9, or click the panic button to mute ALL audio immediately. Press again to restore normal operation.
panic_button.tip: The panic button works instantly - it's designed for emergencies, not regular muting.

safety_mode_normal.title: Normal Mode
safety_mode_normal.content:
In Normal mode, you have full control! You can:

• Create and remove connections
• Adjust volumes
• Reorganize nodes
• Do anything you need

This is the default mode for everyday use and experimentation.
safety_mode_normal.tip: Normal mode is great for setup and experimenting, but consider Read-Only or Stage mode for important sessions.

safety_mode_readonly.title: Read-Only Mode
safety_mode_readonly.content:
Read-Only mode lets you observe without risking changes. Perfect for:

• Monitoring a working setup
• Showing someone your configuration
• Preventing accidental modifications

You can still look around, select things, and view details - you just can't change anything.
safety_mode_readonly.tip: Think of Read-Only as 'museum mode' - look but don't touch!

safety_mode_stage.title: Stage Mode 🎤
safety_mode_stage.content:
Stage Mode is your live performance guardian! It combines:

• Read-Only protection (no accidental changes)
• Routing Lock (connections stay put)
• Enhanced panic button visibility
• Extra confirmation for any changes

Use this when you're performing live or recording something important.
safety_mode_stage.tip: Stage Mode makes the panic button extra prominent - because in a live situation, you need to find it FAST.

routing_lock.title: Routing Lock 🔒
routing_lock.content:
Routing Lock freezes your connections in place. With it enabled:

• No new connections can be made
• Existing connections can't be removed
• You can still adjust volumes and move nodes

It's perfect when you've got your routing just right and want to protect it while still tweaking levels.
routing_lock.tip: Routing Lock + Normal Mode = You can adjust volumes but can't accidentally disconnect anything.
